text.title: Redis Data Structure Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply nosql-redis-patterns end-to-end.

step.name: enumerate-patterns
step.action: Capture every key access pattern + atomicity needs.

step.name: pick-data-types
step.action: Apply decision tree per pattern → type.

step.name: design-ttls
step.action: Add TTL per key or namespace sweep.

step.name: write-key-schema
step.action: Author key-schema.yaml with all required fields.
